name: Pineapple Cream Cheese Ball
recipeInstructions:
1. Allow the cream cheese to soften at room temperature.
2. Drain the pineapple thoroughly (you may need to squeeze it).
3. Finely chop the walnuts, onions, and green pepper.
4. Once the cream cheese has softened (you can use a microwave on power setting 30 for 1 or 2 minutes to expedite this process), add all ingredients together and mix well until combined. Form the mixture into a ball.
5. Refrigerate until the cream cheese is firm again.
Author's Notes:
This spread pairs nicely with crackers, bagels, celery (and other vegetables) or my favorite, low-salt Triscuits.
For a party presentation, you can cut off the top of a large pineapple and form the cream cheese ball into an oval. Place the pineapple top onto the cream cheese oval to create a pineapple shape. Use the remaining pineapple slices or chunks as garnishes around the cheese ball.
